    A

    addShip(IShip) - Method in class iscteiul.ista.battleship.Fleet
    Adiciona um novo navio à frota, garantindo que as regras do jogo são cumpridas.
    addShip(IShip) - Method in interface iscteiul.ista.battleship.IFleet

    B

    Barge - Class in iscteiul.ista.battleship
    Represents a Barge ship in the Discoveries Battleship Game.

    Constructs a Barge with the specified orientation and starting position.

    printFloatingShips() - Method in class iscteiul.ista.battleship.Fleet
    This operation prints all the ships of a fleet but not yet shot
    printShipsByCategory(String) - Method in class iscteiul.ista.battleship.Fleet
    This operation prints all the ships of a fleet belonging to a particular category
    printStatus() - Method in class iscteiul.ista.battleship.Fleet
    Imprime na consola um relatório completo com o estado atual da frota.
    printStatus() - Method in interface iscteiul.ista.battleship.IFleet

    Prints the board showing valid shots that have been fired

    T

    taskA() - Static method in class iscteiul.ista.battleship.Tasks
    This task tests the building up of ships: For each ship, reads positions and indicates whether the ship occupies each one of such positions or not
    taskB() - Static method in class iscteiul.ista.battleship.Tasks
    This task tests the building up of fleets
    taskC() - Static method in class iscteiul.ista.battleship.Tasks
    This task tests the building up of fleets and takes into consideration the possibility of cheating
    taskD() - Static method in class iscteiul.ista.battleship.Tasks
    This task also tests the fighting element of a round of three shots
    Tasks - Class in iscteiul.ista.battleship
